raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A blue Pepsi can stands on a gray desk. The can is rigid with a cylindrical body. STRATEGY - reach the can at its body for a stable grasp, then push it to the side to knock it over. Failure mode: if the push is too weak, the can won't tip; if too strong, it might roll off the desk. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach can body; Step 2 grasp can body for secure hold; Step 3 push can body to the side.

Goal: knocked_over(pepsi_can)
Scene: pepsi_can, desk
Step 1: reach(pepsi_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the pepsi can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pepsi_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pepsi_can) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pepsi_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the pepsi can
  contact: holding(pepsi_can) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pepsi_can)
Step 3: push(pepsi_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the pepsi can
  contact: pushing(pepsi_can) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: knocked_over(pepsi_can)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the pepsi can
the body of the pepsi can
the body of the pepsi can
